EDC16CP33 - JDAc - V1-(Diag On CAN)

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E0
Recv ID: 7E8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

    "version": "DAC0"
